title: Immigration, inflation and more: A guide to GOP platform priorities
shortDescription: The Republican Party released its 2024 platform ahead of the RNC, listing 20 promises and policy positions that read like Donald Trump rhetoric.

title: What we know about Trump rally shooting victims: Former fire chief killed
shortDescription: Authorities said Corey Comperatore, a Pennsylvania firefighter, was killed in Saturday's shooting. Two others were injured and are in critical condition Monday.

title: Trump assassination attempt hovers over RNC in Milwaukee | The Excerpt
shortDescription: President Joe Biden decried political violence during an address. Plus, how did the Secret Service allow a shooter to get so close to Donald Trump?

title: Trump documents case tossed based on 'unconstitutional' special counsel
shortDescription: Judge Aileen Cannon dismissed the criminal case against former President Donald Trump over his handling of classified documents.

title: Trump rewrites RNC speech after assassination attempt
shortDescription: Former president Donald Trump said Saturday's shooting provided a moment to "bring the whole country" together.

title: What do older voters want? Care for caregivers | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus: Alec Baldwin's 'Rust' case dismissed by a judge over 'suppressed' evidence. Study finds 40% of cancers preventable with lifestyle changes.

title: Republican convention updates: Trump expected to reveal VP pick
shortDescription: Trump's running mate decision could come on the first day of the GOP's convention in Milwaukee, Wisconsin, when Republicans will begin laying out their conservative pitch.

title: 'Trump-authorized' GoFundMe for rally victims over $4M
shortDescription: A Trump rally victims fundraiser organized by Meredith O'Rourke has huge donations from Dana White, Kid Rock and Ben Shapiro.

title: Butler County DA not planning to file criminal charges in Trump shooting
shortDescription: Donald Trump vowed not to let a would-be assassin's bullet keep him from the Republican National Convention, which opens today.

title: King Charles sends private letter to Trump after assassination attempt
shortDescription: King Charles sent Donald Trump a letter after the candidate was injured when a shooter opened fire at a campaign rally in Pennsylvania.

title: Republican National Convention to showcase future GOP stars
shortDescription: The next generation of GOP stars will take advantage of one of the biggest political stages in the country at the Republican National Convention.

title: Joe Biden to sit down with Lester Holt: When and where to watch interview
shortDescription: President Joe Biden is set to sit down with NBC's Lester Holt Monday night after the assassination attempt on Trump.

title: Congress negotiates $105B deal to make air travel safer
shortDescription: Congress has reached an agreement on a $105 billion bill to enhance air travel safety following a series of near-misses at airports nationwide.

title: Blue-collar town tries to dig out from infamy after Trump shooting
shortDescription: A city in Pennsylvania steel country is reeling from the Trump shooting. Residents are searching for answers and hope amid the chaos.

title: Joe Biden must stand by Donald Trump, his longtime rival, after stunning attack
shortDescription: Rematch between Joe Biden and Donald Trump already was filled with unexpected twists. The assassination attempt against Trump injects further turmoil.

title: Trump bloody fist pump photo now on candidate’s website
shortDescription: A fundraising platform for conservative candidates now features a black-and-white photo of Trump raising his fist shortly after the rally shooting.

title: What Biden said about Trump, rally shooting during White House address
shortDescription: President Biden addressed the nation the day after a shooting broke out at a Trump rally. Here's what he said about the attack on his political rival.

title: Biden calls for unity after Trump rally shooting
shortDescription: President Joe Biden called for unity across the country following the assassination attempt of former President Donald Trump.

title: Biden says politics can't be a 'battlefield' after Trump assassination attempt
shortDescription: "Disagreement is inevitable in America lives. Politics must never be a battlefield or God forbid, a killing field," President Joe Biden said.

title: Watch live: Biden speaks from Oval Office Sunday
shortDescription: President Joe Biden is scheduled to address the nation Sunday night from the Oval Office to update the Trump shooting investigation. Watch live here.

title: Timeline of a mystery: Thomas Crooks' path to shooting Trump
shortDescription: The mystery of how a cook at a nursing home became a would-be assassin of Donald Trump is the subject of intense investigation and public shock.
